name: Lashi

ancestors.notes: Descent per Glottolog classification of Lashi (lash1243).

notes: Skeleton. Lashi (Leqi) is a Burmish (Sino-Tibetan) language of Myanmar and Yunnan, written here in a Latin-based transcription. Base Latin consonants and vowels plus digraphs ch/sh/ts/ng/ny, aspirates kh/ph/th and the voiceless lateral hl are mapped. Lexical tone is not recovered by the romanization and is left unencoded, so an elevated PER floor is expected.

sources.author: Hammarström, H. et al. (Glottolog 5.0)
sources.title: Glottolog: Lashi (lash1243)
sources.publisher: Max Planck Institute for Evolutionary Anthropology
